text: Net interest margin compression risk remains relevant given Bank of America's business model across Consumer Banking, Global Banking, and Global Markets segments. Revenue volatility is evident from quarterly performance, with Q3 2025 revenue of $48,221,000,000 representing 3.33% year-over-year growth following a -0.69% decline in Q2. Net income showed greater volatility at 19.01% YoY growth in Q3 after a -3.79% decline in Q2, suggesting earnings sensitivity to macroeconomic conditions including interest rate environments and credit spreads that affect the company's lending and trading operations.

citations.text_snippet: Bank of America Corporation, through its subsidiaries, provides banking and financial products and services for individual consumers, small and middle-market businesses, institutional investors, large corporations, and governments worldwide.
